","subtaskID":0,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\Record\JudgeResult\TestCaseJudgeResult"}],"judger":"","time":280,"memory":412,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\Record\JudgeResult\SubtaskJudgeResult"}],"finishedCaseCount":0,"status":12,"time":280,"memory":412,"score":100,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\Record\JudgeResult\JudgeResult"},"version":401,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\Record\RecordDetail"},"sourceCode":"#include<bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;
int n,a[100005],sum,ans,ans1;
int main()
{
	cin>>n;
	for(int i=0;i<n;i++)
	{
		cin>>a[i];
		sum+=a[i];
		ans1=max(ans1+a[i],0);
		ans=max(ans,ans1);
	}
	cout<<ans-(sum-ans);
	return 0;
}","time":280,"memory":412,"problem":{"pid":"CF33C","title":"Wonderful Randomized Sum","difficulty":3,"fullScore":100,"type":"CF"},"contest":null,"sourceCodeLength":231,"submitTime":1722589749,"language":28,"user":{"uid":1024038,"name":"lin_yna","avatar":"https://cdn.luogu.com.cn/upload/usericon/1024038.png","slogan":"rp++","badge":null,"isAdmin":false,"isBanned":false,"color":"Green","ccfLevel":5,"xcpcLevel":0,"background":""},"id":170135838,"status":12,"enableO2":false},"testCaseGroup":[[0]],"showStatus":true},"currentTitle":"R170135838","currentTheme":{"id":321387,"header":{"imagePath":"https://i.loli.net/2019/05/02/5cca6b2808d2a.jpg","color":[[94,114,228,1],[130,94,228,1]],"blur":0,"brightness":0,"degree":87,"repeat":0,"position":[100,1],"size":[-1,-1],"type":1,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\User\ThemeConfig\HeaderFooterConfig"},"sideNav":{"logoBackgroundColor":[94,114,228,1],"color":[94,114,228,1],"invertColor":true,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\User\ThemeConfig\SideNavConfig"},"footer":{"imagePath":"https://i.loli.net/2019/05/02/5cca6b2808d2a.jpg","color":[[119,149,248,1],[103,114,229,1],[85,90,191,1]],"blur":0,"brightness":0,"degree":150,"repeat":0,"position":[1,100],"size":[0,0],"type":1,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\User\ThemeConfig\HeaderFooterConfig"}},"currentTime":1782187299,"currentUser":{"followingCount":99,"followerCount":41,"ranking":11089,"eloValue":1304,"blogAddress":"https://www.luogu.com.cn/blog/asos1324/","unreadMessageCount":0,"unreadNoticeCount":0,"uid":1024038,"name":"lin_yna","avatar":"https://cdn.luogu.com.cn/upload/usericon/1024038.png","slogan":"rp++","badge":null,"isAdmin":false,"isBanned":false,"color":"Green","ccfLevel":5,"xcpcLevel":0,"background":"","verified":true}}
